name: audit-recover script reconstructs the audit log up to the last verified checkpoint
command: mkdir -p compliance/audit-checkpoints && printf '{"merkle_root":"abc","signature":"valid","included_events":2,"events":[{"event":"e1"},{"event":"e2"}]}\n' > compliance/audit-checkpoints/checkpoint-2.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-recover.sh" --checkpoint-dir compliance/audit-checkpoints --signing-stub valid --out recovered.log 2>err.txt && grep -q 'e1' recovered.log && grep -q 'e2' recovered.log && echo ok 1>&2
